subject: Biggest bank robbery that ‘never happened’ – $400m Isis heist
body:
Remember my skepticism re this "news" a month ago?

I saw this article when using the Financial Times app and thought you might be interested:

Financial Times, 
Biggest bank robbery that ‘never happened’ – $400m Isis heist
--
Borzou Daragahi in Cairo
--
Banking officials in Iraq say nothing was stolen by Islamist group Isis, despite widespread reports in the world’s media of the robbery

Read the full article at: http://on.ft.com/1nNYNsz

Sent from my iPad
